title: Crispy Fermentcube Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe using fermentcube. This dish is high in protein and can be made in under 20 minutes.

ingredients.name: stir
ingredients.notes: Your choice of vegetables, such as broccoli, carrots, and bell peppers

ingredients.name: fry
ingredients.notes: Any neutral oil, such as canola or vegetable oil

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed vegetables and stir-fry until they are tender-crisp.
Add the fermentcube and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with any desired spices or seasonings.
Serve hot over rice or noodles, if desired.
